headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Jabil (JBL) After Its 3x Three-Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Jabil at US$339.82 is offering good value after such a strong run, or if most of the upside is already priced in. The stock is down 4.3% over the past week, up 5.6% over the past month, and up 41.4% year to date, with a 1 year return of 102.8% and a 3 year gain of more than 3x, while the 5 year return is very large. Recent headlines have focused on Jabil's role in electronics manufacturing and contract production partnerships, which keeps attention on its position in key supply...
